header: The values we hire and lead by
subheadline: Three principles that guide how we build the product and treat each other.

value_items.title: Customers first
value_items.description: Every decision starts with the people who use our product. We talk to them weekly and ship what they actually need.

value_items.title: Default to trust
value_items.description: We give ownership early, share context openly, and assume good intent. Autonomy beats approval chains.

value_items.title: Ship to learn
value_items.description: Small bets in days, not big bets in quarters. We'd rather learn from a rough launch than polish in private.
